name: GlennCheng-prd-writer
description: Interactive PRD creation skill for Claude Code — AI acts as a PhD advisor to brainstorm and clarify requirements

plugins.name: prd-writer
plugins.description: 互動式 PRD 起草 skill。AI 扮演指導教授角色，先腦力激盪確認問題方向，再透過動態 Clarify 互動產出結構化 PRD。支援 Jira/Confluence/Notion/GitHub 整合或無工具環境。
